title: Design Critique
use_when: Get structured design feedback on usability, hierarchy, and consistency. Use when asked to review a design, critique a mockup, react to a screen, or provide feedback on a Figma link, screenshot, or description from exploration through final polish.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Design Critique when the request is mainly metric diagnosis, pricing, GTM, or implementation planning without UX evidence; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Design Critique UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
framework_fit: Design Critique fits Design work in the Design lifecycle when the user needs Design Critique UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Design Critique UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks without tying recommendations to the user's Design stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Design Critique as generic Design advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Design Critique when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $design-critique to turn this design context into a decision-ready Design Critique UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks.
examples.expected_artifact: Design Critique UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
